overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring dark underground ruins with wooden scaffolding and platforms. The environment features a green-teal color palette with warm artificial lighting from lamps and torches, creating a mysterious atmosphere as the character navigates across wooden walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden scaffolding platform in underground ruin

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily across wooden platforms toward an illuminated central structure

entered.detail: tall wooden support beams and platforms forming the structure of the ruin
small container emitting bright green light, likely a game collectible
round wooden barrel with metal bands
tall wooden structure with bright yellow light source at the top
planked wooden walkway with gaps between boards

segments.scene_description: The character walks across wooden scaffolding platforms in a dark underground ruin. Green glowing containers and wooden barrels are visible nearby, while ahead stands a tall illuminated structure casting warm yellow light against the cool green ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden platform with open cavern view

events.description: character moves past central structure revealing open cavern with night sky visible above
ambient light increases as character faces the open cavern area

agents.ego_description: character continues walking past the central tower, moving toward the edge of the platform to survey the open area

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with clouds visible through the opening in the cavern ceiling
silhouetted stone structures visible in the far distance against the sky
warm orange light source mounted on wooden post

segments.scene_description: Passing the central illuminated tower, the scene opens up to reveal a vast cavern with the night sky visible above. The character walks along the edge of the wooden platform, with distant ruins silhouetted against the dark blue sky and warm torchlight visible on the right.

events.description: character stops walking and begins looking around the environment

agents.ego_description: character stops at the platform edge and surveys the surrounding ruins, turning to look at different angles of the environment

entered.detail: tall dark silhouette of a tower visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an upper observation platform and stops to survey the expansive ruin environment. The camera pans to show the night sky and distant tower silhouettes while the character looks around, with green glowing containers visible in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic underground ruin that gradually opens into a vast, starlit cavern. It begins with the character traversing wooden scaffolding amidst green glowing containers and barrels, moving toward a tall structure that casts a warm yellow glow against the cool ambient light. As the character passes this central tower, the enclosed space expands to reveal a massive open cavern where the dark blue night sky becomes visible above distant, silhouetted ruins. The scene then shifts as the character ascends to an upper observation platform, with the camera panning across the expansive environment and distant towers. Finally, the movement settles as the character stops to survey the landscape, framed by the green glow of nearby containers under the open sky.
